features.name: procedural continuous assignment in always block
features.description: Code should include a procedural continuous assignment (assign/deassign) inside an always block with sensitivity to a signal
features.snippet: always @reset if (reset) assign out = 0; else deassign out;

features.name: mixing procedural continuous assignment with non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include both a procedural continuous assignment in one always block and a non-blocking assignment in another always block
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) out <= out + 1;
always @reset if (reset) assign out = 0; else deassign out;
